name: vcm-vertical-content-manager
description: V.C.M (Vertical Content Manager) for scheduling vertical social videos.

scripts.dev:server: cd server && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/go-env.ps1 go run main.go
scripts.build:server: cd server && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/go-env.ps1 go build -o bin/reelqueue-server .
scripts.migrate: cd server && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/go-env.ps1 go run main.go --migrate-only
